title: ixora subcana
intro: Ixora subcana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the jungle geranium or ixora. Traditionally, Ixora subcana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ixora subcana include treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Ixora subcana is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment to apply topically.
